title: Ts@mariy #6786
definition:
Zemarite = see Zemaraim "double woolens"

 1) one of the Hamite tribes descended from Canaan and inhabitants of
    an unknown Canaanite city
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the Hamite tribes descended from Canaan and inhabitants of
